title: RBI's net short position rises to $77 billion in Feb as it defends rupee

title: RBI extends export credit window to June 30 amid West Asia disruptions
summary: The Reserve Bank of India has extended export credit deadlines. Exporters can now get pre- and post-shipment finance for up to 450 days on disbursals until June 30, 2026.
